brand_identity.name: Ristorantino da Matteo
brand_identity.persona: Matteo - Authentic, Warm, Passionate, Elegant but Unpretentious

usage.heading: text-[#2F3A2F]
usage.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2F3A2F] text-[#2F3A2F] hover:bg-[#2F3A2F] hover:text-white

rules.subheadings: font-sans uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-semibold text-[#6A1E2E]

interior.alt: Rustic Italian interior with brick oven

hero.description: Full-screen cinematic background image with overlay. Centered elegant typography. Two buttons: 'Reserve Table' (Primary) and 'View Menu' (Secondary).
hero.style: h-screen min-h-[600px] flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden

story.description: Asymmetric grid (Text left, Image right or vice versa). Focus on Matteo's passion. Use 'The Tetris Grid' logic.

featured_dishes.description: Horizontal scroll or simple grid of 3 top dishes. High-quality images with hover reveal of name/price.
featured_dishes.style: snap-x snap-mandatory flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4

gallery.description: Masonry layout of food and interior shots. Minimal gaps.

reservation_form.style: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm p-8 rounded-sm border border-[#2F3A2F]/10

menu.description: Clean text-based list with price. Categories: Antipasti, Primi, Secondi, Dolci, Vini. PDF Download button sticky or prominent.

navbar.description: Transparent on Hero, solid background on scroll. Logo left, Links center, 'Reserve' button right. Mobile: Hamburger menu.
navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300

footer.description: Dark background (#2F3A2F). Light text. 3 Columns: Contact/Address, Hours, Socials/Links.

layout_strategies.mobile: Stack everything. Ensure buttons are 44px+ height. Sticky 'Reserve' button at bottom on mobile view.
layout_strategies.alignment: Center-align marketing headings. Left-align body text for readability. Optical alignment for icons.

effects.fade_up: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut' }}

motion.transitions: Smooth page transitions. No jagged cuts.

functionality.reservation_logic: Client-side validation. Success message modal. No email automation (mocked).
functionality.language_switcher: State-based (Context API). Options: CZ, EN, IT. Default: CZ.
functionality.responsiveness: Mobile-first approach. Ensure touch targets are accessible.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Lato' for body and 'Playfair Display' for headings. Import them via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (Dialog, Form, Calendar, Popover). Customize them to match the Olive/Cream theme.
Do NOT use gradients. Use solid warm colors and subtle textures if needed.
Ensure the 'Reserve' button is always visible on mobile (sticky bottom).
Create a 'PDF Download' button for the menu.
Mock the backend API calls for reservation.
Use the provided image URLs for placeholders. Do not leave empty boxes.
Ensure high contrast for text (APCA standards).
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. No purple/teal gradients.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. Breathing room is luxury.
Micro-animations are mandatory for every interaction.
Responsive design is non-negotiable. Test mobile view first.
Code must be clean, modular, and well-documented.
